../rpc/messages, ../../../peerid

Types

PreambleInfo = ref object
  messageId*: MessageId
  messageLength*: uint32
  topicId*: string
  sender*: PeerId
  startsAt*: Moment
  expiresAt*: Moment
  deleted*: bool
  peerSet*: PeerSet
Source   Edit   
PreambleStore = object
  byId*: Table[MessageId, PreambleInfo]
  heap*: HeapQueue[PreambleInfo]
Source   Edit
